content_of_post_to_comment:
I am currently managing my 2.5 hours studying streak since 50 days and am curious how many hours you give to studying consistently in your life and no matter what after those 2.5 hours ( 3 50 mins pomos ) i can't really study "consistently" everyday. Its not like i just study 2.5 hours everyday but maybe i study more 1 day in 4 or something like that but yeah i can't go more than 2.5 consistent and i m more sticked to timing. can i change myself ? Do anyone else experience this that after their specified studying time they can't study anymore ? and can it be changed ?

to be honest i m being a procrastinator since 2 years and now i am able to stop procrastination but just for 2.5 hours in my day and i want to study more, but curious what should be ideal time to study and how much you all study
